reasoning: The control CM-3 (2) focuses on ensuring that configuration changes are tested, validated, and documented. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to several areas: (1) Admission controllers can be used to validate changes before they are applied, ensuring they meet certain criteria. (2) Audit logging can capture configuration changes for documentation and review. (3) RBAC can enforce change control by limiting who can make changes to configurations, ensuring only authorized users can apply changes.
title: Configuration Change Control | Testing, Validation, and Documentation of Changes
